mapper.sql: id, username, real_name, phone, email, status, TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createTime
mapper.select: SELECT , password FROM sys_user_info WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0

SELECT
FROM sys_user_info WHERE delete_flag = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_user_info SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
